dungeon: Multi-dungeon run incl. Septavius the Ghost God fight + Galactic Zones
map: DOCUMENTED biomes: grey diagonal-walled CHECKERED stone crypt (Septavius fight), brown/red caverns, a large blue OCEAN with islands, a teal/turquoise dungeon, a red/orange concentric-ring LAVA boss arena (bullseye), a dark cosmic bullet-hell zone, and a multi-color checkered-floor dungeon. Variety = a Galactic-Zones-heavy session plus a crypt boss.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: Septavius the Ghost God is a minion-summoning crypt boss with an IMMORTAL phase that drops to vulnerable ('I am weak... I cannot stay immortal'). GALACTIC ZONES /25 counter CONFIRMED: '<Medusa> The Mysterious Card has been defeated! (8/25...)' — defeating zone bosses increments an X/25 counter (toward the Mothership, per prior recovery). Global SPAWN/DEFEAT announcer uses random PERSONA names (this stream: Starforce, Orc, Medusa; prior stream: Harpy/Drake/Leviathan/Chaotical): '<Starforce> A Ortar has just spawned!', '<Orc> A Grand Sphinx has just spawned!'. Event/zone bosses named: Ortar, Grand Sphinx, The Mysterious Card.

confidence: HIGH for Septavius taunts (full set, VERBATIM where not clipped) + Galactic /25 counter + announcer personas; MEDIUM for biomes; bosses Ortar/Grand Sphinx/Mysterious Card DOCUMENTED by name.
